source: in-session Claude Code agent (pred-scout-coach) over data/omeda/items.json only; every number ground-checked against the item, failing lines dropped

items.wizard-crest: A mage starter: mana back on hits keeps early poke flowing, and after restoring 300 Mana it evolves at base.
items.titan-crest: A tank starter: the health, armor, and slow self-heal soak lane poke, evolving into Goliath Crest after restoring 340 Health.
items.aegis-of-agawar: A crit fighter's safety buy: 400 health plus armor bonuses that jump to 20% while below 40% Health — for divers who fight surrounded.
items.stonewall: For frontliners into physical-heavy teams: 70 physical armor, health regen, and extra physical damage mitigation make you the wall.
items.ruination: For crit builds hunting mana-hungry heroes: the bleed drains mana and returns 80% of it as true damage, refreshed by your abilities.
items.caustica: For mages into stacked magical armor: ignore 35% of it, and deal extra damage for every point of bonus magical armor they built.
items.tainted-trident: For physical ability fighters facing healers: cuts the target's healing by 45% for 3s while adding penetration and bonus damage.
items.soulbearer: A no-cost mage active: every 120s gain a shield plus 20% magical lifesteal and 10% movement speed for clutch all-ins.
items.onixian-quiver: For crit carries: 2 extra projectiles per attack, 25% more total crit chance, and damage mitigation that grows as your health falls.
items.lunaria: For healer-mages: your damage builds Incandescence charges that Mending converts into a heal on your lowest-health teammate.
items.megacosm: For mages fighting tanks: burns 2.5% of the target's max health plus 6% of their bonus health over 3s, on a durable body.
items.luxforge-lantern: For fighters who join kills: takedowns and ward kills bank permanent physical power up to 30 stacks, with 7% movement speed to roam.
items.crystalline-cuirass: For tanks into magical damage: 60 magical armor plus stacking armor that pays 12% movement speed at 5 stacks while you brawl.
items.orion: For casters who also attack: converts 80% of your item ability haste into attack speed and ramps damage on one focused target.
items.painweaver: For physical ability users who stay aggressive: repeated hits stack penetration and movement speed up to 4 times, rewarding relentless pressure.
items.sky-splitter: For attack-speed fighters into big health pools: each hit carves 5.5% of the target's current health, so tanks stop feeling unkillable.
items.pygmy-dust: A support utility pick: shrink a diving enemy to slow them 40% and cut their damage 30%, or speed up a fleeing ally.
items.iceskorn-talons: A brawling team's active: an 8s ice sheet that speeds and strengthens allies standing on it while slowing enemies — best in grouped fights.
items.mindrazor: For physical casters facing clumped enemies: your ability damage cleaves around the target, with mana and power to keep casting.
items.keeper-crest: A support starter: charges deal damage and pay gold when an ally is nearby, evolving after 150 Gold — income without taking minions.
items.sharpshooter-crest: A carry starter: small heals on attacks sustain the lane, evolving to a Legendary Crest after restoring 150 Health.
items.nex: A burst active for divers: stores 18% of your recent damage as Sow, then unloads it on nearby heroes with an 80% slow.
items.alternator: For heroes with alternate abilities: 15% more alternate-ability damage plus Adeptus stacks that evolve it into Alternata at 15.
items.dynamo: A bruiser value buy: armor and 300 health, enemies you immobilize take 10% more damage, and the power bonus adapts to your build.
items.ashbringer: For crit attackers weaving abilities: every hit refunds 8% of your basic cooldowns, and critical strikes refund even more.
items.necrosis: For carries whose ultimate wins fights: 25 Ultimate Haste plus 15% more ultimate damage on top of crit and attack speed.
items.demolisher: For crit builds into armor stackers: ignore 25% of physical armor, and your attacks and crits ignore another 30% of bonus armor.
items.tainted-scepter: For mages facing healers: cuts healing 45% for 4s, while Malice stacks make every spell sting harder after takedowns.
items.marshal: For casters who weave basic attacks: 15% attack speed with on-hit damage that grows per level, plus mana regen to keep casting.
items.warp-stream: A utility buy for ability-reliant tanks: a faster-cooldown Tele-Blink escape plus 25 Ultimate Haste, on 400 health and mana.
items.tainted-blade: For bruisers into sustain: cuts the target's healing by 45%, and Hex makes them take 5% more damage during your trades.
items.mistmeadow-buckler: For physical fighters into mages: recharging Mistwood Guard charges can block up to 50% of incoming hits, with 40 magical armor.
items.world-breaker: For tanky mages in long fights: stacking 2% magical damage up to 6 times, with tenacity against stuns and roots.
items.combustion: For burst mages: 85 magical power with penetration, and Pyro periodically splashes bonus damage to the target and nearby enemies.
items.penumbra: For ability-spam fighters: Essence Reaper refunds 4s off your basic cooldowns, so your combo returns while they are still recovering.
items.ortus: A snowball active for killers: a burst of speed and power where takedowns permanently bank 3 Physical Power and refresh the window.
items.occult-crest: A mage starter: small heals as you fight sustain early trades, evolving into Warlock Crest after restoring 200 Health.
items.champion-crest: A bruiser starter: a rolling self-heal keeps you trading, and it evolves to a Legendary Crest after restoring 200 Health.
items.volcanica: For bruisers who cast constantly: every cast shaves your other cooldowns, with the ultimate refunding the most — weaker on stance switchers.
items.elafrost: For tanky junglers: the empowered attack slows by 35%, splashes damage around the target, and hits monsters 60% harder for fast clears.
items.tranquility: A healer support's income item: a group heal with 10% damage mitigation every 40s, plus a third ward for vision control.
items.cybernetic-drive: For tanks who want finishing power: a periodic executing attack that splashes damage and heals you, plus 12% to both total armors.
items.fist-of-razuul: For big-health bruisers: 550 health, and a charged empowered attack that hits heroes twice as hard and heals 65% of the bonus.
items.entropy: For multi-hit mages: every ability tick adds bonus damage, so damage-over-time and rapid-fire kits squeeze the most from it.
items.oathkeeper: For mages who mix in basic attacks: a frequently recharging empowered hit adds real on-hit damage atop 80 magical power.
items.cursed-scroll: For attack-speed tanks: strong regen and both armors at the price of hurting yourself — the curse cannot take you below 35% Health.
items.envy: For physical burst assassins: a guaranteed critical strike on your next attack, plus Hush silencing the target's escape for 0.8s.
items.orb-of-growth: For scaling mages: farm and takedowns bank bonus experience until it evolves into Orb Of Enlightenment, with missing-health regen meanwhile.
items.spectra: For on-hit attackers: 20 bonus damage per hit stacks Prism, triggering Prisma damage that grows as the target's health drops.
items.alternata: The evolved Alternator: 15% more alternate-ability damage, plus Nata Style refunding 12% of your other basic cooldowns.
items.rapture: For sustain brawlers: 300 health, omnivamp, and attack speed with bonus on-hit damage — built for fights that go long.
items.everbloom: For healer supports: your protection also grants 5% damage mitigation and 20 Tenacity, making every save a little stronger.
items.dust-devil: For crit carries who keep firing: stacking attack speed that pays 10% movement speed at 5 stacks, with crits stacking twice as fast.
items.infernum: For physical ability fighters into tanks: repeated hits ignite targets for a slice of their max health, scaling with your penetration.
items.prophecy: For attack-speed mages: 75 magical power plus on-hit magical damage, blending spell power into every basic attack.
items.gaia-greaves: For mobile frontliners: Tremor stacks unload as bonus attack damage, with 65% higher jumps for creative engages — avoid getting slowed.
items.draconum: For healing-based bruisers: armor and power with stacking 2% healing amplification, plus a health restore to lean into sustain fights.
items.tainted-bastion: For tanks facing magical sustain: cuts the attacker's healing by 45% and mitigates damage, doubled against Blighted targets.
items.orb-of-enlightenment: The evolved Orb Of Growth: stacked magical power and health for scaling mages, with 3% missing-health restore to stay on the map.
items.saphirs-mantle: A tank's growth active: grow 10% bigger and healthier, damage nearby heroes, then permanently keep 20% of that damage as max health.
items.citadel: For physical bruisers who frontline: solid health and armor, and Intimidation strips 20% of enemies' physical armor for your whole team.
items.manta-scythe: For farming carries who split off: bonus minion damage, permanent power from siege minions and camp leaders, and 10% extra damage to loners.
items.resolution: For attack-based fighters: on-hit damage plus a mana bank that converts into bonus physical power once it fills at 400.
items.witchstalker: A duelist's cleanse: purge debuffs, then land a max-health-scaling empowered hit that heals you — doubled when something was actually cleansed.
items.dreambinder: For mages who need stickiness: 80 magical power and 325 health, with spells slowing by 25% so targets cannot walk away.
items.wraith-leggings: For full-damage mages: 100 magical power, penetration, movement speed, and 12% bonus ability damage — pure kill pressure.
items.terminus: For lifesteal carries: excess healing becomes a shield, so the sustain you built keeps working even at full health.
items.storm-breaker: For attack-speed fighters in grouped fights: charged attacks release chain lightning across 7 targets that also applies your on-hit effects.
items.vainglory: For pure tanks: health plus both armors, with stacking Vanity and a flat 10% bonus pushing your armors even higher mid-fight.
items.epoch: A mage's panic button: 2.5s of Stasis to dodge a killing blow or a huge ultimate while your team arrives.
items.pacifier: An assassin's finisher active: dash, then strike 2.5x harder against targets below 20% Max Health, recasting if you secure the kill.
items.warden-crest: A support starter: charges heal you and pay gold when allies are near, evolving to a Legendary Crest after 150 Gold.
items.fire-blossom: For tanks who sit in melee: an aura that burns nearby enemies harder the longer it ticks, up to 50% more damage.
items.tainted-totem: For casting supports against sustain: your spells cut healing 45%, and Blighted Well lets an ally you buff spread the effect too.
items.tainted-charm: For tanky utility builds: healing reduction that also slows by 12%, on a body with health, tenacity, and mana regen.
items.rebirth: For divers who die making plays: 300 health and 50 physical power, plus a resurrection that turns a traded body into a second chance.
items.void-conduit: For sustain-hungry tanks into mages: magical armor with 6% omnivamp and missing-mana regen, keeping you topped up between fights.
items.gravitum: A pick tool for bruisers: an infinite-range projectile that Grounds the first hero hit for 2s, cancelling escapes before a dive.
items.warrior-crest: A bruiser starter: rolling self-healing sustains early trades, evolving into Champion Crest after restoring 200 Health.
items.time-flux-band: A mage's aggression reset: mark the ground, commit, then teleport back with basic cooldowns refreshed and 20% of missing mana returned.
items.guardian-crest: A support starter: heal-and-gold charges that only trigger near allies, evolving into Keeper Crest after 150 Gold.
items.lightning-hawk: For crit carries who kite: charged attacks add burst damage with a 20% slow, keeping targets inside range of your next shot.
items.scattershot: For crit carries into grouped enemies: Scatter adds 2 homing projectiles that crit, lifesteal, and carry your on-hit effects at 50% strength.
items.the-perforator: For physical casters into armor: ignore 30% of physical armor while your spells slow by 10%, keeping shredded targets in reach.
items.obelisk: A scaling mage active: enhanced attacks collect Souls from kills, each permanently adding damage and 1 Magical Power.
items.assassin-crest: An assassin starter: penetration and haste with small heals as you fight, evolving to a Legendary Crest after restoring 200 Health.
items.raiment-of-renewal: For regeneration tanks: 700 health plus 3% of your missing health back every second, so short trades barely dent you.
items.nuclear-rounds: For carries whose abilities matter: heavy attack speed and crit with 10-20% stronger ability damage — a bridge between attack and spell builds.
items.reclamation: A support utility item: cleanse yourself and nearby allies every 180s to erase enemy lockdown, plus a third ward for vision.
items.crescelia: For supports and casters who weave attacks: the empowered hit adds damage and refunds 12% of your basic cooldowns.
items.wardens-faith: For tanks into crit carries: 70 physical armor, 20% less damage taken from critical strikes, and attackers lose 8% physical power.
items.equinox: For carries who get burst down: full damage stats plus an on-demand 350-750 shield and tenacity against lockdown.
items.exodus: A displacement active for fighters: a grenade that stuns, launches enemies back, and makes them take 20% more of your damage.
items.magnify: For sustained-damage mages: 10% omnivamp and spells that stack a 6% magical armor cut, ramping your damage the longer you cast.
items.crystal-tear: For casting supports: Elation grants you both 30 Magical Power and 15 Ability Haste, turning your buffs into team damage.
items.brutallax: A cleanse for basic-attack bruisers: purge debuffs and gain 100% Tenacity, with each successful hit extending the effect.
items.frosted-lure: For engage tanks: a 40% slow burst around you that shields for 150% of the damage dealt — dive, slow, and survive.
items.warlock-crest: The evolved Occult Crest for mages: more power and health, with small heals continuing until the Legendary evolution.
items.solstice: For fighters in repeated skirmishes: Pendulum stacks convert into a hit healing 135% of its hero damage — strongest right after takedowns.
items.vanquisher: For crit carries closing kills: heavy power and penetration, and Annihilate outright executes wounded targets so nobody escapes on a sliver.
items.typhoon: A no-cost attack-speed engine: on-hit stacks build attack speed up to 4 times, with a short Mirage dash for repositioning.
items.enras-blessing: For supports guarding dive targets: when a nearby ally is Immobilized they automatically receive a shield — insurance against pick attempts.
items.imperator: For committed crit carries: 65 physical power with crit chance, and Precision makes every critical strike hit 30% harder.
items.xenia: For shield supports on a budget: a recharging per-target shield with rounded armor, health, and haste for constant small saves.
items.overlord: For cleaving bruisers: area damage around your target plus Devourer permanently stacking health from farm, camp leaders, and heroes.
items.transference: For shield-heavy teams' tanks: expiring shields return as healing, with 8% movement speed and 10% stronger armors to keep frontlining.
items.magician-crest: A mage starter: mana refunds on hits keep early spellcasting going, evolving into Wizard Crest after restoring 300 Mana.
items.lifecore: For damage-dealing healers: your damage builds charges that fire a healing wisp at your lowest-health nearby ally.
items.abyssal-dart: An assassin's gap-closer active: dart a hero, teleport to them, and land bonus damage with a 70% slow — a full engage in one slot.
items.dawnstar: For melee tanks trading blows: your hits stack a 2.5% damage cut on enemies up to 5 times, while Crusader adds 30% attack speed.
items.liberator: A carry's cleanse active: purge all debuffs and gain a shield, turning a caught-out death into a survived fight.
items.spear-of-desolation: For assassins built around their ultimate: 25 Ultimate Haste plus a 10% damage window for 6s to snowball combos.
items.syonic-echo: For melee fighters who burst: Duplicity resets your basic attack and speeds your next 3 swings by 30%, packing damage into short windows.
items.echelon-cloak: For flankers: go Camouflaged between fights, regenerate missing health and mana, and exit with 8% bonus damage for the ambush.
items.florescence: A playful support utility: place a bouncy Starshroom for launch-pad rotations and escapes, plus a third ward and gold income.
items.unbroken-will: For tanks into magic and lockdown: 400 health, magical armor, tenacity, and Undying boosting both armors 25% when hits land.
items.astral-catalyst: For ultimate-centered mages: 20% off your ultimate cooldown, plus bonus damage capped by your shield size — pair it with shield effects.
items.silentium: A support pick tool: silence a hero for 0.75s with real damage attached, plus a third ward — it interrupts escapes and channels.
items.tainted-guard: For armored tanks against healing divers: attackers get their healing cut 45% and bleed for extra damage just for hitting you.
items.basilisk: For physical bruisers into armor: hits stack a 4.5% armor cut toward Eroded, with movement speed bursts to stay glued to targets.
items.lifebinder: For sustain mages: 80 magical power and 12% magical lifesteal, with Twilight Sonata quietly stacking more of both.
items.golems-gift: For mages harassed by physical damage: Stone Skin stacks grant power and armor, and every cast restores a stack — a caster's armor buy.
items.galaxy-greaves: A utility armor pick: both armors with 7% movement speed, plus a charged super-jump for creative escapes over terrain.
items.rogue-crest: An assassin starter: small heals as you fight, evolving into Assassin Crest after restoring 200 Health.
items.winters-fury: A no-cost teamfight active: an expanding ice sphere that slows and makes enemies take 10% more magical damage — cast it before your combo.
items.spellbreaker: For mages into enemy burst casters: Veil blocks the next ability every 60s while Malefic adds 15% to your magical power.
items.goliath-crest: The evolved Titan Crest: more health and armor with steady self-healing until the Legendary evolution — the standard tank path.
items.malady: For assassins who chain kills: Demise stacks bonus damage and resets on takedowns, while Parting Gift explodes targets based on max health.
items.razorback: A tank's anti-dive active: 20% more of both armors while reflecting 15% of incoming hero damage — it punishes teams that jump you.
items.overseer: For late-game mages: penetration and lifesteal where Exalted deals 15% more damage and heals you for 25% of hero damage.
items.vanguardian: A budget tank rounder: both armors, tenacity, and haste in one slot, with Guardian adding extra armor for cheap durability.
items.amulet-of-chaos: For combo mages: 95 magical power with penetration, and Deadly Wish refunds 65% of your basic cooldowns for an immediate second combo.
items.deathstalker: For attack-speed physical carries: hits stack armor shred up to 4 times while Onslaught adds even more attack speed for long fights.
items.cursed-ring: For on-hit machine-gun builds: 1.2x total attack speed and a raised 4-attacks-per-second cap, traded for 25% weaker basic damage.
items.noxia: For two-part combo mages: marking then hitting with a second ability detonates 6% of the target's maximum health as bonus damage.
items.solaris: For crit fighters weaving attacks between spells: the empowered hit can crit, adds damage, and heals 65% of what it deals.
items.voidgazer: A no-cost poke active: a piercing projectile that slows 35% and makes the target take 15% more of your follow-up damage.
items.spirit-of-amir: For magical junglers: 12% more ability damage to monsters, lifesteal inside the jungle, and bonus power outside it — clears and ganks covered.
items.earthshaker: For melee hybrid fighters: attacking stacks a 1% ability-damage boost up to 10 times, with melee heroes stacking twice as fast.
items.legacy: For bruisers facing heavy lockdown: tenacity and magical armor, plus a self-cleanse with 3s of crowd-control immunity to finish plays.
items.giants-ring: For ability-cycling tanks: Retribution constantly shaves your cooldowns, and Gigantism makes you bigger, tougher, and faster-cycling for 6s.
items.leafsong: A support mobility tool: 30% movement speed for nearby allies with slow immunity — team-wide engage or escape every 100s, plus vision.
items.salvation: For melee bruisers who all-in: a big shield with 10% Omnivamp on demand, though ranged heroes only get half the shield.
items.dread: For physical assassins diving mages: penetration and power with a returning shield that blocks 25% of magical damage for 3s.
items.hexbound-bracers: For mana-hungry tanks: taking damage refunds mana, missing mana boosts regen, and Hexed Guard blunts enemy basic attacks.
items.soulbinder: For long-range artillery mages: 7% bonus damage on far hits and Farseer permanently stacking magical power all game.
items.truesilver-bracelet: For supports saving divers: a shield granting crowd-control immunity while it holds, then exploding for 40% of its starting value.
items.azure-core: For mana-scaling mages: 450 max mana, a periodic shield, and a mana bank that converts into bonus power once full at 400.
items.inquisition: For tanky junglers into mages: magical armor and health, with Psywave splashing area damage that hits monsters 45% harder.
items.timewarp: For cooldown-obsessed casters: 25 ability haste, big mana regen, and Chime cutting a further 1s from basic cooldowns.
items.mesmer: For physical divers into casters: Vengeful Shroud blocks the next ability every 60s, letting you engage through the enemy's answer.
items.flux-matrix: For tanks enabling magical teammates: affected enemies take 10% more magical damage and lose half their tenacity to your team's lockdown.
items.judgement: A brawler's no-cost active: area damage around you that heals per hero hit — strongest when you are surrounded.
items.vyzar-carapace: For combo fighters: landing 3 Scorn stacks triggers Shell Smash for level-scaling damage plus a shield, rewarding full rotations.
items.oblivion-crown: The mage capstone: 120 magical power increased by a further 25% — pure scaling for builds already stacked with power.
items.sanctification: A support utility item: a group shield granting 50% Tenacity while it holds, plus a third ward — buy it into lockdown-heavy teams.
items.windcaller: For roaming supports: Zephyr speeds you and an ally 8% on a short per-target cooldown, turning chases and escapes.
items.plasma-blade: For hybrid attackers: physical and magical power together with stacking crit chance — for kits whose attacks and spells both scale.
items.berserkers-axe: For sticky bruisers: an empowered hit that slows 50% plus a 15% movement speed burst — built for running down kiting targets.
items.spectral-schematics: For mages into healthy targets: Breakthrough adds damage scaling with 5% of the target's current health, hitting hardest at first contact.
items.consort-crest: A poke support starter: damage-and-gold charges near allies, evolving into Keeper Crest after 150 Gold.
items.tyranny: For takedown-chaining bruisers: Oppression's speed and 20 Ability Haste re-trigger on takedowns, with 15 Ultimate Haste for faster ultimates.
items.void-helm: For sustain tanks into magic damage: 400 health, magical armor, and healing 20% more from every source — pairs with any healer.
items.eviscerator: A no-cost duel active: 20% attack speed, 8% omnivamp, and bonus on-hit damage for 6s — pop it to win extended trades.
items.mutilator: For ability bruisers into tanks: each ability applies max-health damage up to 3 times, with 12% omnivamp funding the brawl.
items.marksman-crest: A carry starter: tiny heals per attack sustain the early lane, evolving into Sharpshooter Crest after restoring 150 Health.
items.nightfall: For ability-based physical assassins: spells heal 6% of hero damage, and Dusk Reaver adds a level-scaling shield for diving.
items.rift-walkers: A playmaking support item: dash and pull nearby heroes toward you — drag enemies into your team or reposition a fight, plus vision.
items.tainted-rounds: For attacking carries against healers: on-hit healing reduction of 45%, with bonus damage that grows as the target's health drops.
items.gamma-gloop: A tank's zoning active: Ground and slow enemies around you in goo — activate it mid-air to land a diving engage.
items.claw-of-hermes: For mages against mana-dependent enemies: your hits drain a slice of their max mana as true damage, punishing ranged heroes hardest.
items.omen: For ability-cycling fighters: charged attacks add damage and refund 25% of your basic cooldowns, keeping combos rolling in long fights.
items.absolution: For carries who get dived: Bravery's 25% damage mitigation and 40% movement speed for 3s turn a collapse into an escape-and-counter.
items.augmentation: For fighters with high base power: the recharging empowered hit converts 90% of your base physical power into on-hit damage.
items.nyr-warboots: A no-cost escape-and-sustain active: 50% decaying speed while regenerating 3% of max health each second for 5s — disengage, then re-enter.
items.tempest: A brawler's aura active: 7s of pulsing area damage that heals 35% of what it deals — strongest in the middle of grouped fights.
items.gaussian-greaves: For mobile casters: a double jump whose landing shockwave damages and slows 40%, plus armor, power, and 7% movement speed.
items.catalytic-drive: For farming tanks: the executing attack pays bonus gold and healing, then the item evolves into Cybernetic Drive at base.
items.demon-edge: For shielded physical divers: 20% movement speed bursts and 45% bonus damage capped by your shield — pair it with shield effects.
items.viper: For on-hit attackers into armor: hits stack a 4.5% armor cut toward Eroded while Diligence adds 8% to on-hit and ability damage.
items.frostguard: For tanks facing attack-speed carries: enemies hitting you stack a 3.5% attack-speed cut on themselves, up to 5 times.
items.devotion: For healer supports guarding fragile allies: heals and shields grow 10% stronger on allies below 40% Health, with big hits reduced 15%.
